name: Real Estate
tagline: Agents that draft listings, qualify leads, and act in your CRM and listing tools.
heroTitle: Close more deals with an agent that does the busywork.
heroSubtitle: Write listing copy, follow up with leads, pull comps, and update your CRM with agents that connect to the tools you already use. Every action runs through one governed layer, so client data stays controlled and nothing falls through the cracks.
intro: Real estate runs on follow-up, paperwork, and being first to respond. Ryu gives you an agent that drafts listings, chases leads, and keeps your CRM current by acting directly in your MLS, email, and calendar through Connections. Client contact details stay governed, and you review every message before it goes out.

highlights.title: Acts in your tools
highlights.description: Connections let an agent update your CRM, send email, and book showings in Google Workspace and your calendar.

highlights.title: Listings in minutes
highlights.description: Turn property facts and photos into polished listing copy, social posts, and email blasts in your voice.

highlights.title: Never miss a lead
highlights.description: Workflows triggered by a new inquiry draft an instant, personalized reply and queue the follow-up sequence.

highlights.title: Client data stays yours
highlights.description: Local-first by default with no telemetry, so buyer and seller details are not handed to a public chatbot.

useCases.title: Listing copy
useCases.description: Turn square footage, features, and neighborhood notes into a compelling listing description plus social captions.

useCases.title: Lead follow-up
useCases.description: Draft a personalized reply to each new inquiry and log it to the CRM, so no portal lead sits cold for hours.

useCases.title: Comparative market analysis
useCases.description: Pull recent comparable sales, organize price-per-square-foot and days-on-market into a table, and draft a pricing rationale.

useCases.title: Showing coordination
useCases.description: Read a buyer's availability, propose showing slots, and create calendar invites once the seller confirms.

useCases.title: Document prep
useCases.description: Draft offer summaries, disclosure checklists, and closing timelines from your standard templates for your review.

useCases.title: Buyer matching
useCases.description: Ground an agent on your active listings and a buyer's criteria so it surfaces the best fits with reasons why.

examplePrompts: Write a listing description and three social captions for a 3-bed townhouse with a renovated kitchen and a rooftop terrace.
Draft a friendly reply to this new portal inquiry and log the contact to my CRM.
Pull recent comps for this address and build a one-page pricing rationale.
Propose three showing times next week that fit this buyer's availability and draft the calendar invites.
Summarize this offer into a one-page brief comparing it to the asking price and terms.

faq.q: Can Ryu connect to my CRM and listing tools?
faq.a: Yes. Through Connections an agent can read and write in CRMs, Google Workspace, email, and calendars, and across 250+ tools via MCP, so it updates records and sends messages where you already work.

faq.q: Will it send emails to clients without my say-so?
faq.a: No. Ryu assists, you approve. Replies and listings are drafted for you to review, and every action runs through the Gateway with a full audit trail of what the agent did.

faq.q: Is my buyer and seller data kept private?
faq.a: Ryu is local-first with no telemetry, so client details can stay on your machine. When you route to a cloud model, the Gateway redacts sensitive data on egress and logs every call.

ctaTitle: Give every agent a tireless assistant.
ctaSubtitle: Draft listings, follow up instantly, and keep your CRM current while you focus on clients.
ctaNote: Acts in your tools · Local-first · Full audit trail
